text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! I can't believe it's
already here! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where's Helios?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
For real? Aw, man. I guess it's just us ringing in
the new year, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is low key depressing, though. I'm so used to
it being the three of us living it up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp, no use moping about it. Let's just party it
up like we always do! We gotta celebrate a year
well spent!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So, what should we to do? Barbecue some
traditional New Year's dishes? Put on some huge
falsies, like the ones lion dance puppets have?!
choice_data_list: You want to barbecue what now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Just thought I'd throw that out there as a
suggestion. Not like there's a way we can really
do that, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like it's hard for Mejiro Palmer to keep
up her spark and energy without her bestie
around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, even if there's no training today,
I'd still like to make a New Year's resolution.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, I wanna decide what races I'm gonna run in
and stuff! Let's see... If we're talking about this
year's biggest event, that's gotta be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yikes! The Classic Triple Crown! Just the title
carries so much pressure and weight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, yeah... I guess this is the year I'll have to face
that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Man, getting categorized into different years
kinda sucks, doesn't it? Like, it doesn't matter
how talented you are. You still gotta compete
with everyone else in your year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's probably safe to say Ryan's at the top of my
class. She's literally the Mejiro's shining star of
speed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna think of being on the same stage as
her, even as a joke! I'm trying my best, but the
skill gap between us is so big...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, reality's coming at me fast! There's only
one thing I can do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's run away, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's escape reality! Setting resolutions is
great and all, but I'm gonna revert back to my
straightlaced self again at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Something fun, something fun... What's something
fun and freeing we can do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer racks her brain to find an escape
path. I try thinking of something too.
choice_data_list: Let's have tea at a cafe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Fieldwork! Yeah! That'll be the best way to blow
off all this antsy energy of mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's get changed and go! Time to break away
and GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer flies out the door in her tracksuit. I
get the feeling I heard those words before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah! Digging holes, harvesting potatoes, and
getting muddy! That's what I'm talking about!
Woo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Whatcha think of my handiwork, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Whoa... You covered the field with holes in the
blink of an eye.

Whoa... You covered the field with holes in the
blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Digging holes has been my thing since I was a kid!
No one else is as fast as me when it comes to
tilling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Why wait for a hole to open up when you can dig
your own to jump into, amirite? Anyway, see you
when I've calmed down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She digs a hole with blazing speed and buries
herself in it just as fast. This unique skill of hers
leaves me dumbfounded, and the new year is only
getting started.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Shopping?! I'm in! This is perfect timing too since
sales are just about to start!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's something I've had my eye on, actually.
All right, shopping therapy, here we come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we go and arrive at none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Check these out, Trainer! Doesn't this golf
apparel look great? Pretty exciting stuff, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's buy them and take a walk around a golf
course in our new threads! We can get some nice,
fresh air that way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After impulse buying a full set of golf apparel,
Mejiro Palmer forgets all about her looming
competitions and enjoys a leisurely afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a cafe! Good idea! Sunny gals like me run on
yap sessions and sugar!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Trainer! I'm seriously craving this one
drink I haven't had in five-ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mix the lemonade in with the iced tea and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! Behold, my very own classic Palmer
blend!
choice_data_list: Classic? Have you made it before?
Classic? Have you made it before?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Everyone would get mad at me back home
because they think it's bad manners to mix drinks,
but I just couldn't stop doing it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Personally, this is my favorite mix, but there're
tons of other great combos too. Wanna try some?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We try fruit soda with milk, as well as cola with
lemon tea. Both are better than I expected. The
two of us enjoy mixing up even more drinks
together.
